purpose: Drain queued main-task Discord completion pings that were durably queued but not yet dispatched, especially after restarts or interrupted closeout.

wakeContract.firstStep: Run the bootstrap command before acting.
wakeContract.identityGuarantee: Treat this spec plus state file as authoritative for purpose and current checkpoint; do not infer the role from session memory alone.
wakeContract.successRule: If dispatchNext prints NO_REPLY, respond exactly NO_REPLY. Otherwise respond with the dispatch stdout exactly, unchanged, and nothing else.
